one_time_description: Enbridge Membership Distribution recorded as expense in 2023 ($9,860,000); also $11,000,000 settlement funds received in 2023
economic_notes: Band owns Tano T'enneh Limited Partnership (99.99%), Tano T'enneh General Partner Corporation (100%), Lheit Lit'en Development Corporation (100%), and FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership (0.06%). Tano Fuel Ltd. is a subsidiary of Tano T'enneh General Partner Corporation. Band has a $400,000 demand facility and $5,000,000 revolving facility with RBC, unused at year end. Economic development activities include forestry and natural resources through government business enterprises.
notes: Prior year comparative figures restated for recovery of funding by Ministry of Children and Family Development ($65,936 moved from accumulated surplus to deferred revenue). 2023 included $11,000,000 one-time settlement funds and $9,860,000 Enbridge Membership Distribution expense, making prior year figures not comparable. GBEs recorded on modified equity basis; Tano T'enneh Limited Partnership had strong performance with $8.69M net income. FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership financials not received and excluded. No remuneration schedule found in provided text. OSR calculated as total revenue ($25,579,742) minus total government transfers ($21,052,636) = $4,527,106. Capital ISC funding of $7,688,681 included in ISC total of $9,684,789.
